title: Mach Mechanic
shortDescription: Hi-Viz Cut5 Mechanical glove. Waterproof. Impact resistant
description: Hi-Viz Cut5 Mechanical glove. Waterproof. Impact resistant

features: Kevlar fabric patch & anti-vibration patch on palm
